site.title: christhoma · Courses
site.tagline: Self-paced, deep-dive courses on building things that matter.
site.author: christhoma

courses.title: Agentic Harness Engineering
courses.subtitle: CS 2960 · A 3-week graduate-style intensive
courses.description: Master the architecture of modern AI agent harnesses (the loop, tools, context, security, and evaluation) by building one from scratch and tearing down the production ones.

courses.title: Applied Music Theory for Guitar
courses.subtitle: MUS-21G · A 3-week intensive
courses.description: Master practical music theory entirely on the fretboard (intervals, scales, chord construction, Roman numeral analysis, minor keys, blues, and modes) through daily lectures, drills, quizzes, and composition projects.

courses.title: Foundations of Photography & the Digital Camera
courses.subtitle: PHOT-10 · A 3-week intensive
courses.description: Go from Auto to intentional (the exposure triangle, focus, reading and using light, the grammar of composition, color, and a complete RAW editing workflow) through daily lectures, shooting assignments, quizzes, and projects. Tailored to the Fujifilm X100VI.

courses.title: The Art of Sampling in Ableton Live
courses.subtitle: MUS-44S · A 3-week production intensive
courses.description: Turn any sound into music. A hands-on course in sample-based production in Ableton Live (chopping breaks, multisampling instruments, designing sound by resampling, arranging loops into a finished track, mixing it, and clearing it legally) through daily lectures, labs, quizzes, and three production projects.

courses.title: Sampling & Beatmaking on the SP-404 MK2
courses.subtitle: MUS-45H · A 3-week hardware sampling intensive
courses.description: Go from never having touched a sampler to making real beats on the Roland SP-404 MK2 (getting sound in and out, recording and trimming a sample, chopping a break, building a drum kit, programming the pattern sequencer, resampling, the SP's signature effects, and arranging it all into a finished track) through daily lectures, machine time, quizzes, and three production projects. Built for the absolute beginner.

courses.title: Operating the SP-404 MK2: The Complete Machine Guide
courses.subtitle: MUS-40H · A 3-week machine-operation intensive
courses.description: Learn to operate the Roland SP-404 MK2 end to end. Not a beatmaking course but a complete beginner's tour of the machine itself: navigation and the menu system, every input and output, the pads, the four-bus effects engine, the pattern sequencer, resampling, DJ mode, and connecting the SP to a computer over USB audio and MIDI. By the end you can find any function, route any signal, and use every major subsystem, through daily lectures, machine time, quizzes, and three hands-on projects.

courses.title: The Home Garden: Pittsburgh
courses.subtitle: HORT E-15 · A 3-week intensive
courses.description: Build and keep a healthy home garden in Pittsburgh's Zone 6b (reading your site and clay soil, choosing and caring for plants, winning the war on weeds and invasives, and running a year-round maintenance system) through daily lectures, field labs, quizzes, and hands-on projects you can do in any season.

courses.title: Clawhammer Banjo: Frailing, Tunes & the Old-Time Tradition
courses.subtitle: MUS-17 · A 3-week intensive
courses.description: Go from never having held a banjo to playing real old-time tunes with a steady, danceable groove: the clawhammer striking hand and bum-ditty, hammer-ons, pull-offs, slides, and drop-thumb, a working repertoire (Cripple Creek, Old Joe Clark, Shady Grove), learning tunes by ear, alternate tunings, and the music's African-to-Appalachian history, through daily lectures, slow practice, quizzes, and recorded projects.

courses.title: Spanish I: Foundations for Speaking
courses.subtitle: SPAN-10 · A 3-week intensive
courses.description: Go from zero to holding real, simple conversations in Spanish. A speaking-first foundations course built on the grammar that matters early: pronunciation and stress, gender and articles, ser vs. estar, the present tense of regular and key irregular verbs, questions, negation, and how Spanish sentences are put together, through daily lectures, handwritten conjugation and copywork, spaced repetition, speaking drills, quizzes, and projects.

courses.title: Spanish II: Intermediate Conversation & Grammar
courses.subtitle: SPAN-20 · A 3-week intensive
courses.description: Move from simple present-tense sentences to talking about anything, in any time frame. An intermediate course in the structures that unlock fluency: the preterite and imperfect and choosing between them, object pronouns, reflexives, commands, the future and conditional, the perfect tenses, comparisons, por vs. para, and the present subjunctive, through daily lectures, handwritten conjugation and composition, spaced repetition, speaking drills, quizzes, and projects.

courses.title: Dungeon Mastering: Running D&D 5e (2024)
courses.subtitle: DM-101 · A 3-week intensive
courses.description: Go from never having run a game to building and running your own Dungeons & Dragons campaign on the 2024 ruleset: the DM's job and the gameplay loop, adjudicating the d20 and the new 2024 actions, running exploration, social, and combat, low-prep adventure design, the 2024 encounter math, worldbuilding only what you use, NPCs and factions, treasure and bastions, rulings over rules, and keeping a campaign alive, through daily lectures, prep labs, quizzes, and three projects that ladder into a playable campaign you run at the table.

courses.title: Home Recording on the Tascam 424 MKIII: Guitar & Bass to Tape
courses.subtitle: REC-24 · A 3-week home-recording intensive
courses.description: Go from never having recorded to capturing real multitrack guitar and bass songs on a 4-track cassette Portastudio, then pulling them into a computer to finish. A hands-on course in the Tascam 424 MKIII: signal flow and gain staging, getting guitar, bass, and pedals into the machine cleanly, recording to tape with dbx, keeping time to a click track, overdubbing, punching in, bouncing tracks to free up space, mixing on the built-in board, and transferring the result to Ableton Live as a stereo bounce or as four separate stems, through daily lectures, machine time at the controls, quizzes, and three recording projects that build into a finished song.
